title: Update Settings
description: Configure the Pages Jaunes Companies Search Export scraper parameters and enrichment options

content.introduction: Configure your Pages Jaunes Companies Search Export squid settings to control pagination and enable detailed company information enrichment. Enable functions to collect email addresses, social media profiles, and official business registration numbers.

squidParams.title: Squid Parameters
squidParams.content: The following parameters can be configured in the `params` object:

rows.description: Maximum number of search result pages to crawl
Visit each business website to collect publicly available email addresses
Visit each listing's detail page to collect SIRET, SIREN, NAF code, company size, creation date, website, Facebook, and Instagram

functionDetails.title: Function Details
functionDetails.content: When `functions.results_details` is enabled, the scraper collects additional structured data:

generalSettings.title: General Settings
generalSettings.content: Standard squid settings that apply to all scrapers:

rows.description: Mark squid as complete when all tasks finish
Remove line breaks from text fields

proTips.content: Enabling `functions.collect_contacts` or `functions.results_details` increases run time due to additional HTTP requests per listing.
SIRET numbers are valuable for B2B verification and can be used to look up official company information in French government databases.

seo.title: Update Settings - Pages Jaunes Companies Search Export - Lobstr.io API
seo.description: Configure Pages Jaunes scraper with enrichment functions to collect SIRET, SIREN, email addresses, and social media profiles from French businesses.
